properties.description: Detects a spike in backend errors from the Nessus service. Multiple errors in a short window may indicate a misconfiguration, resource issue, or active exploitation attempt against the scanner API.
properties.query:
NessusLogs
| where LogType == "BackendLog" and BackendLogLevel == "error"
| summarize ErrorCount=count(), Errors=make_set(BackendMessage, 10) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where ErrorCount >= 5
| extend HostCustomEntity = Computer
